peer_group_definition: Series A/B B2B software companies showing hiring or delivery-scale pressure
prospect_position_summary: Relative to a fast-growing peer set, the prospect shows early growth signals but not a strongly visible delivery-capacity story.
recommended_hook: Lead with a grounded note about growth pressure and ask whether delivery bandwidth is keeping pace with hiring plans.

gap_findings.title: Delivery-capacity visibility gap
gap_findings.description: Peer companies present clearer evidence of structured engineering scale than the prospect currently does.
